# gradle-check-updates

The missing dependency updater for Gradle. Fast, byte-precise, and security-focused CLI to upgrade dependencies in Kotlin/Groovy DSLs, Version Catalogs, and gradle.properties.

## Key Information
- **Main Website**: https://secretx33.github.io/gradle-check-updates/
- **Source Code**: https://github.com/SecretX33/gradle-check-updates
- **npm Package**: https://www.npmjs.com/package/gradle-check-updates

## Features
- **Byte-Precise**: Only version strings are modified. No reformatting or comment loss.
- **Fast**: Queries Maven repositories directly, bypassing Gradle daemon overhead.
- **Comprehensive**: Supports Kotlin DSL, Groovy DSL, Version Catalogs, and gradle.properties.
- **Security-First**: Built-in cooldown window to protect against supply-chain attacks.

## Core Commands
- `gcu`: Preview available upgrades (dry-run).
- `gcu -u`: Apply upgrades to build files.
- `gcu -i`: Launch interactive TUI picker.
- `gcu --cooldown 7`: Skip versions published in the last 7 days.

- [Technical Design](https://secretx33.github.io/gradle-check-updates/BOOTSTRAP)
